action.proof_term:
intro n W P
have hproduct : ∀ {a b n : ℕ}, a ^ 2 < n → b ^ 2 < n → a * b < n := by
  intro a b n ha hb
  rcases le_total a b with hab | hba
  · have hmul : a * b ≤ b * b := Nat.mul_le_mul_right b hab
    exact hmul.trans_lt (by simpa [pow_two] using hb)
  · have hmul : a * b ≤ a * a := Nat.mul_le_mul_left a hba
    exact hmul.trans_lt (by simpa [pow_two] using ha)
by_cases hp : ∃ i j : Fin W, i ≠ j ∧ P i * P j < n
· exact Or.inl hp
· right
  apply Finset.card_le_one.mpr
  intro i hi j hj
  simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hi hj
  by_contra hij
  exact hp ⟨i, j, hij, hproduct hi hj⟩

intro n W P
have hproduct : ∀ {a b n : ℕ}, a ^ 2 < n → b ^ 2 < n → a * b < n := by
  intro a b n ha hb
  rcases le_total a b with hab | hba
  · have hmul : a * b ≤ b * b := Nat.mul_le_mul_right b hab
    exact hmul.trans_lt (by simpa [pow_two] using hb)
  · have hmul : a * b ≤ a * a := Nat.mul_le_mul_left a hba
    exact hmul.trans_lt (by simpa [pow_two] using ha)
by_cases hp : ∃ i j : Fin W, i ≠ j ∧ P i * P j < n
· exact Or.inl hp
· right
  apply Finset.card_le_one.mpr
  intro i hi j hj
  simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hi hj
  by_contra hij
  exact hp ⟨i, j, hij, hproduct hi hj⟩

info.lean_statement:
∀ (n W : ℕ) (P : Fin W → ℕ),
      (∃ i j : Fin W, i ≠ j ∧ P i * P j < n) ∨
        (Finset.univ.filter fun i : Fin W => (P i) ^ 2 < n).card ≤ 1

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
